attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
       BATCH_ID ,
       OBJECT_ID ,
       DEAL_OBJECT_ID ,
       COMPETITOR_NAME ,
       COMP_PROD_NAME,
       COMP_TYPE ,
       COMP_TECH ,
       COMP_ADD_INFO ,
       CREATED_BY ,
       CREATED_ON ,
       UPDATED_BY ,
       UPDATED_ON ,
       DM_UPDATE_DATE ,
       SOURCE ,
       INITIATED_SOURCE, 
       COMP_PROD_EU_PRICE ,
       CREATE_DATETIME ,
    ACTION_CODE,
        'RI'EXCEPTION_TYPE 
     FROM $$STGDB.WI_CQ_COMPETITOR EXCQ  
 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT  1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL DEALS 
 where  DEALS.SK_DEAL_OBJECT_ID_INT=EXCQ.DEAL_OBJECT_ID
 AND DEALS.SS_CODE <> 'CCWR' -- to filter out CCWR Deals
 )

SELECT 
BATCH_ID ,
      OBJECT_ID ,
      DEAL_OBJECT_ID ,
      COMPETITOR_NAME ,
      COALESCE(COMP_PROD_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS COMP_PROD_NAME,
      COMP_TYPE ,
      COMP_TECH ,
      COMP_ADD_INFO ,
      CREATED_BY ,
      CREATED_ON ,
      UPDATED_BY ,
      UPDATED_ON ,
      DM_UPDATE_DATE ,
      SOURCE  ,
      INITIATED_SOURCE, 
      COMP_PROD_EU_PRICE ,
      CREATE_DATETIME ,
      ACTION_CODE 
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_CQ_COMPETITOR
where COMPETITOR_NAME IS NOT NULL
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY DEAL_OBJECT_ID,COMPETITOR_NAME,COMP_PROD_NAME ORDER BY UPDATED_ON DESC)=1

SELECT 
 BK_DEAL_ID,
 COALESCE(COMPETITOR_NAME, 'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SRC_RPTD_COMPETITOR_NAME,
 COALESCE(COMP_PROD_NAME, 'UNKNOWN') AS BK_COMPETING_PRDT_DESC,
 COALESCE(COMP_TYPE, 'UNKNOWN') AS COMPETITOR_PRDT_TYPE_CD,
 COALESCE(COMP_ADD_INFO, 'UNKNOWN') AS ADDITIONAL_INFO_TXT,
 COALESCE(COMP_TECH, 'UNKNOWN') as COMPETING_TECHNOLOGY_DESC,
 COALESCE(DM_UPDATE_DATE, cast ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' as TIMESTAMP(0))) AS SRC_LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
 COALESCE(CAST (DM_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE ),DATE'3500-01-01') AS DV_SOURCE_LAST_UPDATE_DT,
 COALESCE(SOURCE, 'UNKNOWN') AS DATA_SOURCE_CD,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)EDW_CREATE_DTM,
  USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
  USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 ACTION_CODE as ACTION_CODE,
 'I' as DML_TYPE 
 FROM 
 (
 SELECT 
 DEAL_OBJECT_ID,
 COMPETITOR_NAME,
 COMP_PROD_NAME,
 COMP_TYPE,
 COMP_ADD_INFO,
 COMP_TECH,
 DM_UPDATE_DATE,
 SOURCE,
 ACTION_CODE 
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_CQ_COMPETITOR 
/*COMMENTED AS PART OF CCW DATA FIX AUG REL */
 /*UNION ALL 
 SELECT 
 DEAL_OBJECT_ID,
 COMPETITOR_NAME,
 COMP_PROD_NAME,
 COMP_TYPE,
 COMP_ADD_INFO,
 COMP_TECH,
 DM_UPDATE_DATE,
 SOURCE,
 ACTION_CODE 
 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CQ_COMPETITOR */
 )CQCOMP
 INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDDB.N_DEAL DEAL 
 ON DEAL.SK_DEAL_OBJECT_ID_INT=CQCOMP.DEAL_OBJECT_ID        
 AND DEAL.SS_CODE <> 'CCWR'
